entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: A legume crop whose cultivars are analyzed for allelic variations to improve crop development.

entities.name: ALLELE MINING
entities.description: A technique used to dissect naturally existing allelic variations in candidate genes to identify novel alleles and haplotypes.

entities.name: ALLELIC VARIATIONS
entities.description: Naturally existing differences in the DNA sequence of genes.

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Genes suspected of being responsible for specific agronomic traits.

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Crucial characteristics of a crop that are targeted for improvement through breeding.

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL GENES
entities.description: Genes that have a known biological function and exhibit allelic variations.

entities.name: R GENES
entities.description: Resistance genes whose evolution is governed by sequence exchange.

entities.name: SEQUENCE EXCHANGE
entities.description: A mechanism involving the exchange of genetic sequences that governs the development of R genes.

entities.name: ALLELE-SPECIFIC MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers generated through allele mining for use in selection processes.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method that uses genetic markers to select for desired traits.

entities.name: HAPLOTYPES
entities.description: Groups of alleles inherited together from a single parent.

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The science of changing the traits of plants to produce desired characteristics.

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism, driving modern plant breeding.

entities.name: GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: The genetic material of plants used for breeding and conservation.

entities.name: GENOMIC RESOURCES
entities.description: The mapped and sequenced genomic data used to facilitate crop improvement.

entities.name: HEREDITARY VARIATION
entities.description: The genetic diversity within a species where novel alleles are concealed.

entities.name: CROP DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The overall process of improving crop varieties for better yield or resilience.
